hooks.command: c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf '%s' "$c" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit' && printf '%s' "$c" | grep -iqE 'claude|anthropic|co-authored-by|generated with|claude-session|claude\.ai|claude\.com|anthropic\.com' && jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Attribution detected in the git commit. CLAUDE.md forbids ANY reference to Claude/Anthropic/AI, Co-Authored-By, Generated with, Claude-Session, or claude.ai/claude.com/anthropic.com in commit messages. Strip every such line and retry."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input | tostring' | grep -iqE 'claude|anthropic|co-authored-by|generated with|claude-session|claude\.ai|claude\.com|anthropic\.com' && jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Attribution detected in the PR/comment. CLAUDE.md forbids ANY reference to Claude/Anthropic/AI, Generated with, Claude-Session, or claude.ai/claude.com/anthropic.com in PR titles, bodies, and comments. Strip it and retry."}}' || true
